hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.subtitle: Building modern web applications with React, TypeScript & .NET

about.heading: About Me
about.summary: Fullstack developer with 11+ years in tech, specializing in React, TypeScript, and C#/.NET. I build web applications end-to-end — from responsive interfaces to scalable backend services — and have hands-on experience with third-party API integrations, legacy codebase modernization, and internal tooling that streamlines business operations.

quests: Built and maintained POS web applications for small-business clients
Delivered fullstack features with React on the frontend and .NET on the backend
Integrated third-party hardware (pin pads, printers) and external APIs
Modernized and modularized legacy codebases to current standards
Conducted code reviews and optimized application performance
Created internal tools to automate business workflows
Designed UX flows and interface layouts for web and mobile projects
Built responsive HTML/CSS templates and React components
Translated business requirements into functional specifications
Analyzed data contracts between system components for a fintech platform
Authored detailed Business Requirements Documents for complex features
Decomposed cross-functional tasks across development teams
Elicited and documented functional and non-functional requirements
Designed REST API architecture and JSON schemas
Created data models, mind maps, and system documentation
Debugged and extended CRM APIs and BPM systems
Designed interface mockups using Axure and Figma
Managed product backlog, iteration planning, and user story refinement
Built and optimized SQL reports using the QlikView BI platform
Defined and maintained product KPIs
Conducted training sessions for end-users
Oversaw lending operations across a branch network
Developed lending methodology and reporting frameworks
Organized training workshops for branch staff
